value:
I'm sorry to hear your account may have been compromised—that's definitely concerning. Unfortunately, resetting an Apple ID is handled directly by Apple rather than our team, so you'll want to go to iforgot.apple.com or contact Apple Support directly to regain access to your account and update the phone number on file.

In the meantime, if you have any issues with our service or your account with us, please let me know and I'm happy to help sort that out.
